features: Skull decoration in black with golden spiders - This bone skull can be used as a creepy Halloween decoration or as an impressive steampunk gothic sculpture that will give any room a gloomy touch.
Ideal for dark romance decoration and fans of Goth decoration - an absolute must for anyone who loves skull gifts and gothic decoration.
This skull sculpture is the perfect gift for skull and skeleton figures collectors as well as for lovers of Mexican culture and Day of the Dead decoration.
With a size of 12 cm high, 9.5 cm wide and 13 cm deep, this skull sculpture fits perfectly as an accessory gothic decoration in your home and is guaranteed to be an eye-catcher.
Skull decoration in a unique steampunk gothic design - gives your home a gloomy but stylish ambience.
description: The skull decoration in colourful with graffiti is the perfect combination of gloomy aesthetics and unique design. This impressive bone skull can shine as a creepy Halloween decoration as well as a fascinating steampunk gothic sculpture in your home. With the golden spiders and gloomy look, it will add an eerie but stylish touch to any room. Whether you are a fan of Dark Romance decoration, Goth decoration or just skull gifts, this sculpture is an absolute must for your collection. It is guaranteed to attract everyone's attention and is the perfect eye-catcher for anyone who loves the scary and dark. The skull sculpture is also ideal as a gift for skull and skeleton figures collectors as well as for lovers of Mexican culture and Day of the Dead decoration. A great gift for birthdays, Christmas or Easter: for adults who appreciate unique decorations. With a size of 12 cm high, 9.5 cm wide and 13 cm deep, this sculpture fits perfectly as an accessory gothic decoration 🏠 in your home and is guaranteed to be an eye-catcher. The unique steampunk gothic design of this skull decoration not only gives your home a gloomy charm, but also an elegant, stylish ambience - for those who are looking for something special.
